text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, King! What is up? Laying eyes<n>on thine
splendid visage today hath<n>verily lifted my vibes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In my quest to become more refined, I<n>have
gained new knowledge from the<n>internet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wanted thee to be the first to witness<n>my
linguistic glow-up! Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right. How about I give you some<n>lessons? First,
we'll learn how to choose<n>the right diction.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, please! That would be indubitably<n>fire!
